name: codegraph_get_detailed_symbol
description: Gets comprehensive symbol details including source code and relationships. USE WHEN: you need full context about a symbol — source code, callers, callees, complexity, and metadata together. MORE COMPLETE than get_symbol_info but heavier. Returns: symbol (name, kind, signature, visibility, uri, line_range, properties), source (full source code string), callers (array), callees (array). Toggle includeSource/includeCallers/includeCallees to control response size. Identify symbol via uri+line or nodeId.

includeSource.description: Include full source code of the symbol

line.description: 0-based line number of the symbol. Use with uri to identify the symbol.

nodeId.description: Internal node ID from symbol_search. Alternative to uri+line.

uri.description: File URI (e.g. file:///Users/me/project/src/main.rs). Use with line to identify the symbol.
